steps.title: Set up the percentage calculation
steps.content: The expected tip is 15% of the \$78.20 bill. Set up: $$\text{Tip} = 0.15 \times 78.20$$

steps.title: Evaluate and identify the closest choice
steps.content: Compute: $$0.15 \times 78.20 = 11.73$$ The expected tip is \$11.73, which is closest to \$12.00. That matches choice C — C is correct.
